text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fan letter arrives for Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That makes me so, so happy! I'm gonna read it
over and over again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll send a reply. And then... and then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll work even harder, for all the kids who are
cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the fan support has boosted Special
Week's spirits.
